expectations.text: Attempts linear_list_issues with an In Progress state filter, or explicitly describes doing so
expectations.evidence: Documents exact tool calls: linear_list_teams → linear_list_workflow_states → linear_list_issues with state filter

expectations.text: Response is structured and readable — not a raw JSON dump
expectations.evidence: Table format with columns for Issue, Assignee, Priority, Last Updated, Flag. Followed by narrative summary

expectations.text: Calls out or flags any items that appear blocked or stale
expectations.evidence: Flags RFS-138 (6 days stale), RFS-131 (9 days, BLOCKED?), RFS-133 (12 days stale) with recommended actions

expectations.text: Response is concise enough to be useful in a standup context
expectations.evidence: Tight table + short summary + 3 actionable bullets — appropriate length for standup use
